title: Regulator Speaker Series
content:
## Regulator Speaker Series
McCarthy Tétrault is pleased to invite you to the third session of our Regulator Speaker Series. In this session Lucie Tedesco (former Commissioner of the Financial Consumer Agency of Canada, current Strategic Advisor, Counsel, McCarthy Tétrault), will sit down with Judith Robertson (Commissioner of the Financial Consumer Agency of Canada) to discuss today’s challenging and rapidly evolving economic environment and its impact on consumers of financial products and services.
This is an opportunity to hear first-hand about the priorities of the Financial Consumer Agency of Canada (FCAC), with a particular focus on its enhanced mandate under the new Financial Consumer Protection Framework and its five-year National Financial Literacy Strategy. Please use this link by May 4, 2023 to list any questions that you would like Lucie to ask Judith as part of this session. We will look to include as many of your questions as possible.
We hope you can join us.
For more information regarding this event, please email clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
This session qualifies for up to 1 hour of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education : This program contains up to 1 hour of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
10:30 a.m. — Registration 11:00 a.m. — Seminar Begins 12:00 p.m. — Seminar Concludes
- Law Society of Ontario – Substantive
- Law Society of British Columbia – Substantive
